sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Flying Attack
special_mechanics.description: Captain America and Hawkeye perform a flying kick during jumps; Iron Man and Vision fire energy beams at 45-degree angle during flight

physics_values.note: Different attack patterns for different characters

special_mechanics.name: Flight Sequences
special_mechanics.description: Occasional side-scrolling flying and shooting sequences. Iron Man and Vision fly on their own; Captain America and Hawkeye use flying machines

special_mechanics.name: Avenger Attack
special_mechanics.description: Ranged special attack - projectile weapon (Captain America's shield, Hawkeye's arrows) or energy beam (Iron Man, Vision)

tier_notes: Tier 3 (Empirical/Qualitative) - Wikipedia source contains only gameplay mechanics and character descriptions. No quantitative physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or movement values documented. NES version is a different game from arcade original, developed as side-scrolling action platformer rather than beat-em-up.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Captain America and The Avengers
